overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking across a medieval fortified bridge at sunset. The character traverses cobblestone walkways, passes through a stone gatehouse, crosses a wooden drawbridge with heavy chains, and enters a city through a second gatehouse, with dramatic golden hour lighting creating silhouettes against the orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval fortified bridge approach with merchant carts and guards

events.description: passes wooden merchant cart and tethered horse on the right side
approaches the stone archway entrance of the gatehouse tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone bridge toward the gatehouse, passing guards and merchant carts

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing near a wooden cart with a horse
group of guards standing near the bridge railing

entered.detail: tall medieval stone tower with arched entrance and crenellated top
cobblestone bridge surface with wooden side railings
wooden merchant cart with canvas cover parked on the side
lit torches mounted on stone walls providing warm light
gothic spires and towers visible in the misty background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone bridge toward a massive stone gatehouse tower at sunset. Merchant carts and guards line the sides of the bridge, with torch sconces providing warm illumination against the cool evening sky. The camera follows steadily as the character approaches the dark archway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gatehouse tunnel with iron portcullis gate

events.description: enters the dark stone archway, lighting shifts dramatically to torchlit interior
approaches the iron portcullis and bright exit at the far end of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed stone gatehouse corridor, passing guards posted along the walls toward the bright exit

notable_agents.action: guard in armor standing against the wall holding a torch

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the gatehouse tunnel with narrow windows
metal portcullis gate with spikes at the tunnel exit
second stone tower visible through the archway at the far end

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark stone gatehouse tunnel, transitioning from the open bridge to an enclosed torchlit corridor. The rough stone walls surround the path as the character approaches an iron portcullis, with bright sunlight visible beyond the exit archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden drawbridge with heavy chains overlooking water

events.description: exits the gatehouse onto the wooden drawbridge with dramatic backlighting from the setting sun
passes the heavy iron chains supporting the drawbridge on the left side

agents.ego_description: ascending the wooden drawbridge toward the setting sun, silhouetted against the brilliant orange sky

notable_agents.action: guard walking across the drawbridge in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden plank drawbridge surface with heavy support beams
thick iron chains suspending the drawbridge from the towers
river water visible through gaps in the bridge sides

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gatehouse, the character crosses the open wooden drawbridge suspended by massive iron chains. The setting sun creates a dramatic silhouette effect as the character ascends toward the second tower, with the river visible below and the first tower now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: second gatehouse tunnel leading to city interior

events.description: enters the second stone archway at the far end of the drawbridge
exits the gatehouse into bright sunlight, revealing the city interior

agents.ego_description: passing through the final gatehouse archway into the city, transitioning from shadow to bright daylight

notable_agents.action: guard standing at attention near the exit archway

entered.detail: cobblestone street with buildings and pedestrians visible through the bright exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters the second stone gatehouse, walking through the dimly lit tunnel toward a bright exit. Passing a guard at the archway, the character emerges into the sunlit city street, completing the crossing of the fortified bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a fortified medieval bridge that transitions from an open sunset walkway through dark stone tunnels and into a sunlit city. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path lined with merchant carts and guards, moving steadily toward the dark archway of a massive stone gatehouse. As the character enters the gatehouse, the scene shifts from the open evening sky to an enclosed, torchlit corridor of rough stone before emerging back into the light. The camera then follows the character across a wooden drawbridge suspended by heavy iron chains, where the setting sun creates a dramatic silhouette against the river below. Finally, the path leads through a second dimly lit tunnel and past a guard, opening up into the bright, sun-drenched streets of the city.
